routes.name: Lumbridge Courtyard to Kitchen Range
routes.summary: Blocked live route. Multiple rollouts reached exterior/wall-adjacent tiles around 3204,3216/3204,3217 and clicked visible doors/trapdoor through walls without proving an interior transition. Do not use until a door transition with reachable pre-tile, object tile, and post-tile is proven.

runPolicy.notes: Enable run when energy is available; this is a short safe route.

safety.notes: No high-risk NPCs observed on the approach. If combat starts, stop and observe before continuing.

steps.instruction: Use Lumbridge courtyard as the route anchor.
Historical bad approach; this reaches the exterior west wall, not a verified kitchen interior tile.
steps.blocker: Live evidence shows this tile leads to cross-wall object clicks and repeated oscillation, not reliable kitchen entry.

steps.instruction: Do not trust this step until the route proves a reachable side and post-door tile.
steps.blocker: Door object 12348 was found and interacted with during live sessions, but the player remained outside/wall-adjacent. interact_object success was not route success.

steps.instruction: After the door interaction, observe position and nearby objects before committing to the final walk.
steps.blocker: The route has not yet proven which side of the door should be used for the final approach.

steps.instruction: Walk to the range tile after any blocking door/object has been handled.

knownBlockers.notes: Repeated live attempts clicked doors/trapdoor through wall-visible geometry and collapsed back to 3204,3216/3204,3217. Needs a new route with reachable adjacency and post-transition proof.

Stand on the west side of the Al Kharid gate.
Pay the 10 coin toll or use the gate object through normal gate handling.
After the gate, walk south on the Al Kharid road.
Arrive at the furnace and observe before smelting.

Pass the cow area; observe if attacked or inventory is valuable.

Follow the fast preview-verified Varrock east bank tail.
Follow the fast preview-verified Varrock east bank tail.
Follow the fast preview-verified Varrock east bank tail.

routes.name: Lumbridge Courtyard to Champions' Guild Stairs
routes.summary: Long south-west Varrock route to the Champions' Guild stairs. The south Varrock tail from Varrock square to the guild stairs is live-verified with run enabled; the full Lumbridge start still needs a single end-to-end run.

routes.name: Varrock Square to Champions' Guild Stairs
routes.summary: Verified south Varrock route from the square to Champions' Guild stairs. MrFlame enabled run at Varrock square, crossed the south Varrock hazard band, arrived at the stairs with 10/10 HP, and was not pulled into combat.

runPolicy.notes: Enable run before leaving Varrock square and do not start the southbound leg below 20 run energy.

safety.notes: Live test saw nearby guards only at the destination, no combat, and no damage. Keep this as a fast transit route, not a place to loiter.

steps.instruction: Start at Varrock square and verify HP, food, and run energy before entering south Varrock.
Enable run and move south toward the sword shop landmark.
Keep running through the hazard band; do not stop to interact.
Arrive at the Champions' Guild stairs and observe before any stair or object interaction.

runPolicy.notes: Run is useful if available, but the live return completed safely even after energy dropped to 4 near Varrock square.

safety.notes: Use as the default safe reset after testing south Varrock; continue to observe if HP drops or combat starts.

steps.instruction: Start at the Champions' Guild stairs and check HP before leaving.

Pass the sword shop landmark without interacting.
Walk east to Varrock east bank and stop there for recovery or banking.

routes.name: Lumbridge Castle Trapdoor to Basement
routes.summary: Verified descent into Lumbridge basement. Route requires reaching the interior west-side trapdoor approach, opening closed trapdoor 14879, then using open trapdoor 10698. This is a two-object chain; the first click alone is not arrival proof.

runPolicy.notes: Very short indoor leg; conserve run. Use run only for longer surface transit to the castle.

safety.notes: Rockslugs level 29 observed in basement, non-aggressive and distant from entry. Do not explore deeper south on low combat without a retreat plan.

steps.instruction: Stand west of the Lumbridge trapdoor; do not try to stand on the trapdoor tile itself.
Open the closed trapdoor from the west side.
Use the open trapdoor to descend into Lumbridge basement.

observations: 2026-05-24 live route reached 3208,9616,0 with HP 10, run 81, one bread. Screenshot lumbridge-basement-arrival-20260524T070644Z.png is 3060x2068 client-window capture.

routes.name: Lumbridge Basement Entry to North Safe Spur

runPolicy.notes: Short safe underground leg; conserve run.

safety.notes: Stay north of the entry; do not continue south toward Rockslugs on a level-3 account without food/run.

steps.instruction: Walk north from the trapdoor arrival area to the safe spur.

observations: 2026-05-24 live probe reached 3208,9620 with HP 10 and run 92; nearbyNpcs empty.

safety.notes: Stay near the entry; avoid going south toward Rockslugs.

steps.instruction: Walk south from the north safe spur back to the basement entry.

routes.name: Draynor Southeast Unicorn Edge to Crate Edge

The intended 3118,3202 target caused oscillation, so route consumers should use 3115,3202 as the verified checkpoint and avoid exact object-adjacent target 3118,3202 until a cleaner local path is learned.

safety.notes: No combat occurred, but a level-33 Black Knight was visible at distance 27. This checkpoint should be treated as transit, not a place to idle.

routes.summary: Hazard-adjacent westward movement from 3102,3171 settled at useful checkpoint 3096,3169. Intended 3088,3176 target was not reached, but normal gameplay safely advanced west with no combat or damage.
